title: Denmark Was Ready to Blow Up Airfields to Stop a U.S. Invasion of Greenland
summary_full: The Danes brought blood supplies, explosives and live ammunition to Greenland as part of contingency plans in case President Trump acted on his threats to seize the island.
summary_public: The Danes brought blood supplies, explosives and live ammunition to Greenland as part of contingency plans in case President Trump acted on his threats to seize the island.
